name: xargs
description: Build and execute command lines from standard input

name: --null
options.description: Items are separated by a null, not whitespace

name: -n
--max-args
options.description: Use at most this many arguments per command line

name: -I
options.description: Replace this string in the command with each input item

name: -P
--max-procs
options.description: Run up to this many processes at once

name: -p
--interactive
options.description: Prompt before running each command line

name: -t
--verbose
options.description: Print each command line before running it

name: -r
--no-run-if-empty
options.description: Do not run the command if the input is empty

args.name: command
args.description: Command to run for the input items
